description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular design. The exterior features large floor-to-ceiling glass windows and sliding doors on the front facade, allowing for ample natural light and a seamless indoor-outdoor connection. The building is surrounded by a low, white boundary wall that encloses a combination of paved black surfaces and green lawn strips, creating a clean and organized landscape. The main entrance is set back from the street, with a driveway and walkway leading up to the front door. The side and rear facades are mostly solid, with minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy. The overall aesthetic is sleek and contemporary, with a focus on geometric lines and open spaces.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with large glass windows, white walls, and a landscaped yard featuring green lawns and black paved areas.
description_view_0: Front view showing expansive glass windows, the main entrance, and a landscaped yard with green and black surfaces.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting a single glass door, a solid white wall, and the continuation of the landscaped yard.
description_view_2: Rear view with a mostly solid white wall and minimal window openings, emphasizing privacy.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the edge of the flat roof, a small window, and the surrounding green and black yard.
